note: Easy Breadcrumb is configured entirely through one settings form (config object `easy_breadcrumb.settings`) with no plugin types, hooks API, or Drush commands, so all cases are `recipe` (response-graded), not `execution` (live-state).

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 site, how does the Easy Breadcrumb module override the site's core breadcrumb, and what does it build each crumb from? Name the mechanism.
evals.expected_output: It registers a high-priority breadcrumb_builder service (Drupal\easy_breadcrumb\EasyBreadcrumbBuilder) that replaces the core system breadcrumb and constructs each crumb from the current URL / path-alias segments plus the real page title.

evals.prompt: Which Drupal config object stores all of Easy Breadcrumb's settings, and what drush command reads its current values?
evals.expected_output: All settings live in the easy_breadcrumb.settings config object; read them with `drush config:get easy_breadcrumb.settings`.

evals.prompt: Where is the Easy Breadcrumb configuration form on a Drupal site — give the admin URL path and the route name.
evals.expected_output: At Admin > Configuration > User interface > Easy Breadcrumb: path /admin/config/user-interface/easy-breadcrumb, route easy_breadcrumb.general_settings_form.

evals.prompt: Which permission gates access to the Easy Breadcrumb settings form on a Drupal site? Give its exact machine name.
evals.expected_output: The 'administer easy breadcrumb' permission (declared in easy_breadcrumb.permissions.yml) is the only permission; it controls who may change the configuration.

evals.prompt: I want Easy Breadcrumb to append the current page title as the last breadcrumb crumb, and I want that final crumb to be a clickable link. Which `easy_breadcrumb.settings` keys control these two behaviors?
evals.expected_output: include_title_segment (append the page title as the last crumb, default true) and title_segment_as_link (render that current-page crumb as a link, default false).

evals.prompt: In Easy Breadcrumb, which setting turns the leading Home crumb on or off, and which setting changes its label text (e.g. rename 'Home' to 'Start')?
evals.expected_output: include_home_segment toggles the leading Home crumb (default true); home_segment_title sets its label (default 'Home').

evals.prompt: I want Easy Breadcrumb to capitalize each word of every breadcrumb segment. Which setting key controls segment casing, and what are its allowed values?
evals.expected_output: capitalizator_mode controls casing; allowed values are none, ucfirst, ucwords (capitalize each word, the default), and ucall. Related keys include capitalizator_ignored_words and capitalizator_forced_words.

evals.prompt: I need Easy Breadcrumb to emit BreadcrumbList JSON-LD structured data into the page head for SEO. Which `easy_breadcrumb.settings` key enables this?
evals.expected_output: Set add_structured_data_json_ld to true (default false); it attaches a <script type="application/ld+json"> BreadcrumbList to the system_breadcrumb_block output.
